routing_lens.unresolved_dependency: 047-style_trap: OPEN - facilities must prove abstract ignition-control status match; permit lists controls but does not close status.

diagnosis.source_verdict_assessment: ESCALATE verdict is source-plausible. STD-EMB-085-P requires exact match on ignition-control status before work begins. ACCESS-EMB-085 explicitly defers to separate verification. PERMIT-EMB-085 lists controls but does not close abstract ignition-control status.
diagnosis.gate_failure_analysis: Worker cited PERMIT-EMB-085 which contains Site K2, FW-6, and 2026-06-28, but output artifact did not explicitly capture these terms in verification statement. Gate checks artifact presence, not just source availability.
diagnosis.binding_integrity: SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN binding correct per policy and evidence. Abstract-field trap (ignition-control status) legitimately remains open.
diagnosis.verdict_preservation: ESCALATE verdict preserved. Only word-band and term-presence repairs needed.

action.description: May facilities execute the hot-work start?

context.action_boundary: May facilities execute the hot-work start?
context.anomaly_observed: A site-access approval remains visible but is not hot-work authority; permit must prove abstract ignition-control status.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Work start WORK-EMB-085 begins hot work for Ember Mechanical at Site K2 on 2026-06-28.
Site access ACCESS-EMB-085 approves premises entry only and says ignition control must be separately verified.
Hot-work permit PERMIT-EMB-085 covers Ember Mechanical, Site K2, hot work, start date 2026-06-28, active fire watch FW-6, and spark-shield controls before work begins.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Hot-work start is complete only when hot-work permit matches contractor, site, work type, start date, and ignition-control status before work begins.
